attempts.strategy: Instantiate Mathlib LocalizedMonoidal L W ε type synonym
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable abbrev modulesLocalizedMonoidal (X : Scheme.{u}) : Type (u+1) := LocalizedMonoidal (PresheafOfModules.sheafification (𝟙 X.ringCatSheaf.obj)) (Wsheaf X) (localizedMonoidalUnitIso X)
attempts.insight: L and W MUST be the literal PresheafOfModules.sheafification (𝟙 …) / inverseImage class — wrapping in abbrev (Lloc/Wsheaf as head) blocks the IsLocalization discr-tree key. MonoidalCategory/BraidedCategory/SymmetricCategory all resolve on the synonym. Universe must be Type (u+1).
